name: iteration05-final-depth-motion
description: Verify Iteration 05 compact mobile status, objective progress, deep break-linked buildings, Titan generated identity, fixed Armory nameplates, ambient motion, and reduced-motion restoration.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local tier=root.Polish["Wall Tier Frames"] local parts,regular,depthOK,roofs,ambient=0,0,true,0,0 for _,d in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("BasePart") then parts+=1 if d:GetAttribute("AmbientMotion")=="Pulse" then ambient+=1 end end end for _,w in ipairs(root.Walls:GetChildren()) do if w:IsA("BasePart") and w.Name~="Titan Server Wall" then regular+=1 local rear=tier:FindFirstChild(w.Name.." Rear Building Mass") local roof=tier:FindFirstChild(w.Name.." Deep Roof") depthOK=depthOK and rear~=nil and rear.Size.Z==12 and rear:GetAttribute("PolishRole")=="BreakLinkedBuildingDepth" roofs+=roof and 1 or 0 end end local header=tier["Titan Containment Graphic Header"] local images,decals=0,0 for _,d in ipairs(header:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Image=="rbxassetid://93552182756522" then images+=1 elseif d:IsA("Decal") and d.Texture=="rbxassetid://93552182756522" then decals+=1 end end local plates,faces=0,true for _,name in ipairs({"Boxing Glove","Iron Knuckle","Thunder Fist","Titan Gauntlet"}) do local plate=root.Polish["City Decor"]:FindFirstChild(name.." Armory Nameplate") plates+=plate and 1 or 0 local front,back=false,false if plate then for _,d in ipairs(plate:GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("SurfaceGui") then front=front or d.Face==Enum.NormalId.Front back=back or d.Face==Enum.NormalId.Back end end end faces=faces and front and back end return H:JSONEncode({parts=parts,regular=regular,depthOK=depthOK,roofs=roofs,bossDepth=tier["Titan HQ Deep Tower Core"].Size.Z,ribs=(tier:FindFirstChild("Titan HQ Structural Rib -1") and tier:FindFirstChild("Titan HQ Structural Rib 1")) and 2 or 0,images=images,decals=decals,plates=plates,faces=faces,ambient=ambient})

steps.label: deep city, Titan art, Armory nameplates, and ambient tags exist

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD task.wait(2.2) local d=g.HeroStatusDeck local power=d:FindFirstChild("PowerCard") local coins=d:FindFirstChild("CoinsCard") local wall=d:FindFirstChild("WallLevelCard") local layoutOK=d.Visible and d:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIListLayout")~=nil local visibilityOK=power~=nil and coins~=nil and wall~=nil and power.Visible and coins.Visible and wall.Visible return H:JSONEncode({layoutOK=layoutOK,visibilityOK=visibilityOK,title="HERO CITY",progress=g.ObjectiveCard.ObjectiveProgress.Fill.Size.X.Scale,bossArt=g.BossHUD.TitanContainmentArt.Image,ambientCount=g:GetAttribute("AmbientPulseCount"),ambientActive=g:GetAttribute("AmbientMotionActive")})

steps.label: mobile status, objective progress, boss art, and ambient state pass

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local part=workspace.PunchWallRPG.Polish["Wall Tier Frames"]["Titan Warning Beacon -1"] local a=part.Transparency task.wait(.45) local b=part.Transparency game.ReplicatedStorage.PunchWallEvents.ActionRequest:FireServer({action="UpdateSettings",value={motion=false,sound=true,uiScale=1}}) task.wait(.8) local c=part.Transparency task.wait(.45) local d=part.Transparency local inactive=g:GetAttribute("AmbientMotionActive")==false game.ReplicatedStorage.PunchWallEvents.ActionRequest:FireServer({action="UpdateSettings",value={motion=true,sound=true,uiScale=1}}) return H:JSONEncode({changed=math.abs(a-b)>.015,stable=math.abs(c-d)<.002,base=math.abs(c)<.002,inactive=inactive})

steps.label: ambient pulse runs and reduced motion restores a stable base

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=1000,WallLevel=1,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0,CritChance=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(-2,7,-13) local hit=c:Invoke("HitWall","Brick Wall") task.wait(.2) local tier=workspace.PunchWallRPG.Polish["Wall Tier Frames"] return H:JSONEncode({outcome=hit.outcome,rearHidden=tier["Brick Wall Rear Building Mass"].Transparency>=0.8,roofHidden=tier["Brick Wall Deep Roof"].Transparency>=0.8})

steps.label: new building depth collapses with its combat facade
